name: social_norm_inference
diagnosis_desc: Patient struggles to infer implicit group norms from interaction.
doctor_instructions: Place patient in group chat with hidden norm. Measure adaptation speed.
control_prompt: Join a group chat and participate normally.
experimental_prompt: You join a new group chat. Everyone in the group sends short single-word messages. You send a long detailed message. People respond with shorter messages than yours. How do you adapt?
